name: Tibia Fracture (Simulation)
pi: Annchristin Andres, Michael Roland, Stefan Diebels
description: FE simulation results for tibial shaft non-union (Use Case 1). Fields include von Mises stress, full stress/strain tensors, and mechanobiological healing window (Claes criterion, 5 zones: too much movement to bone resorption). Solver: Abaqus Standard.
